dimensions.fix_hint: Keep every core capability backed by run assertion evidence and explicit process traces.
dimensions.name: Codex CLI live capability coverage

dimensions.fix_hint: Repair showcase scenario prompts, expected routes, evidence files, or routing fixture links.
dimensions.name: Example coverage

dimensions.fix_hint: Restore required productization docs, schema, or scripts.
dimensions.name: Productization assets

dimensions.detail: recommended, full, and dev marketplace indexes validate
dimensions.fix_hint: Rebuild all profiles and repair marketplace index schema, visibility, or runtime path mismatches.
dimensions.name: Marketplace index validation
dimensions.verification_command: python3 scripts/validate-marketplace-index.py --profile recommended && python3 scripts/validate-marketplace-index.py --profile full && python3 scripts/validate-marketplace-index.py --profile dev

dimensions.detail: config_present=True, selected_license_non_null=False, selected_license_allowed=True, license_file=False, pyproject_license_not_proprietary=False, contribution_licensing_confirmed=False, contribution_licensing_evidence=False, security_contact_confirmed=False, security_contact_evidence=False, dist_release_policy_explicit=True, dist_release_policy_valid=True
dimensions.fix_hint: Owner must select an OSI license, update package metadata, confirm contribution licensing, and configure private vulnerability reporting before open-source publication.
dimensions.name: Open-source readiness
dimensions.source: config/open-source-release.yaml, docs/LICENSE_DECISION.md, docs/OPEN_SOURCE_READINESS.md, pyproject.toml, CONTRIBUTING.md, SECURITY.md, LICENSE

dimensions.fix_hint: Run hook validation and inspect hook runtime changes; hooks must remain advisory and fail-open unless explicitly stricter.
dimensions.name: Hook safety

dimensions.fix_hint: Run installation validation after rebuilding all profiles.
dimensions.name: Installation validation

live runtime telemetry sample.meaning: Sanitized bounded facts from an actual hook runtime execution.

local_codex_cli_live_benchmark.meaning: Opt-in local Codex CLI benchmark run with sanitized bounded artifacts.

promoted golden case.meaning: Human-reviewed case admitted to regression coverage.

runtime telemetry fixture sample.meaning: Deterministic executor-adapter fixture-derived bounded facts; not live runtime telemetry.

structural fixture.meaning: Local deterministic structure sample passed; not evidence of live task success.
